title: Settings
subtitle: Dashboard preferences, notifications and account security
languageHint: Choose the interface language. Saved in this browser.

staleDays.title: Dashboard: usual circuit
staleDays.description: Days without a session on your most-used circuit before cars are marked as pending to run there. Default: {{default}} days. Allowed range: {{min}}–{{max}}.
staleDays.label: Days without session (threshold)
staleDays.hint: After saving, reload the dashboard to see the pending alerts block with the new criteria.
staleDays.savedDetail: Preference saved. The dashboard will use this threshold on next load.
staleDays.invalidDays: Enter a valid number of days.

notifications.title: Discord & Telegram
notifications.cardDescription: After each POST /api/sync/timings a summary is sent (best lap, delta vs PB, consistency) if you configure at least one channel. Discord webhook is yours. Telegram uses a shared server bot; you only provide your Chat ID.
notifications.discordHint: Create in Discord: Channel settings → Integrations → Webhooks.
notifications.telegramHint: Open {{botHandle}}, press Start (or add to a group) and paste the chat_id here.
notifications.telegramHelpTitle: Help: connect to the bot and get your Chat ID
notifications.telegramHelp1b: Press Start or send any message. Without this, Telegram won't deliver messages.
notifications.telegramHelp1c: For group alerts, add {{botHandle}} to the group and send a message.
notifications.telegramHelp2a: Message @userinfobot on Telegram and press Start. It shows a numeric Id.
notifications.telegramHelp2b: In a private chat with {{botHandle}}, that Id is usually your Chat ID above.
notifications.telegramHelp3a: Groups usually have a negative Id. Use @getidsbot in the group to get it.
notifications.telegramHelp3b: Make sure {{botHandle}} is still in the group.
notifications.telegramHelpFooter: After saving your Chat ID, use Send test. If it fails, check you messaged {{botHandle}} and the server has TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN set.
notifications.saved: Notifications saved. After sync, summary will be sent via Discord and/or Telegram if configured.
notifications.testSent: Test message sent (check Discord and/or Telegram).

account.passwordDescription: While signed in you can set a new password. Sign out on devices you don't own.
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least {{min}} characters.
account.passwordMismatch: Confirmation does not match the new password.
account.debugDescription: Check API URL, server status and Supabase counts without exposing secret keys.
